title: Ollamaduct
description: Local-first AI gateway for Ollama - install via @ollamaduct/gateway - supporting both local and cloud-hybrid model orchestration; engineered multi-tenant workspaces, vector-based semantic caching (95% match rate) to reduce latency, and an automated Privacy Shield for redacting 25+ PII entity types via a high-performance Bun-powered CLI.

title: Haribon
description: Autonomous civic-tech agent for the BetterGov.ph platform; architected a Hybrid-RAG pipeline using LangGraph to automate data aggregation and content summarization, enabling high-fidelity retrieval of civic information and public records through an extensible agent harness.

title: Workflow
description: Agentic Waste Engine using a Multi-Agent System (MAS) architecture to transform rigid collection schedules into a demand-responsive network; orchestrated autonomous workflows with LangGraph and developed a custom MCP server to bridge the Binspire API with LLMs, enabling self-correcting data retrieval and proactive operational tasking for urban disposal.

title: Binspire
description: A Smart Waste Management System (SWMS) powered by real-time agents to make waste collection more efficient, sustainable, and transparent.

title: BLEPP Reviewer
description: An AI-powered exam preparation companion for Board Licensure Examination for Psychometricians (BLEPP); featuring an intelligent review agent that provides timed practice exams, tracks progress with analytics, and works offline through Progressive Web App (PWA) technology.

title: Vantage
description: A local-first, high-precision resume intelligence engine engineered to uncover the "why" behind career performance, analyzes skill density and industry alignment providing data-driven insights without sensitive data ever leaving your local environment.

title: Base
description: An opinionated, Full-Stack Monorepo - install via @create-base-stack - designed for high-performance applications. Averaging 400+ weekly downloads, it leverages a strictly type-safe architecture to streamline workflows and ensure end-to-end integrity across the stack.

title: Hiraya
description: A Filipino-inspired programming language to explore language design, syntax parsing, and compiler construction, demonstrating solid expertise in compiler architecture, abstract machine design, and programming language theory.

title: Predicting Carbon Monoxide Levels
description: A machine learning powered CO prediction system that analyzes environmental sensor data to forecast carbon monoxide levels with high accuracy, enabling improved real-time air quality monitoring and supporting data-driven public.

title: ART
description: A execution time measurement, profiling and efficiency analysis to evaluate algorithmic complexity in practice.
